topic: How much time does your team spend answering client status questions every week?
format: Walk through a day-in-the-life of an HR team managing this manually — show every broken step in sequence
post:
5–8 hours a week. That's how much time your HR team loses just answering status update questions — before they've touched a single real task.

Twelve WhatsApp messages before 8:15 AM. Same questions, different names: "What's the status of my visa?" "Has my salary been processed?" "Did you submit my work permit?"

She doesn't know off the top of her head. So she opens three spreadsheets, checks two email threads, calls the PRO, and types out individual replies — all before her first coffee.

That's not a bad morning. That's every morning.

For HR and payroll teams running things manually in Oman, status updates alone eat 5–8 hours a week. Hours that should go toward actual work: WPS payroll submissions, Ministry of Labour filings, end-of-service calculations, Omanisation tracking.

Instead, your team is a human search engine for information that should just be visible.

SmartPRO Hub gives every client and employee their own portal. They can check their documents, visa status, and payroll without asking anyone. Your HR team stops fielding the same question for the fifteenth time and gets back to the work they were actually hired to do.

One platform. Built for Oman. Starts at OMR 12/month.

If your team is spending more time answering questions than solving problems, something is broken — and it's not your team.

Book a free 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=pain
